giant cell tumor: bone structure maintains continuity but exhibits localized areas of decreased density
cortical thinning is evident without associated fracture lines
lesion presents as a well-defined radiolucent area with sclerotic margins
trabeculae appear disrupted with increased spacing and irregularity
endosteal scalloping is noted along the affected bone cortex
osteochondroma: bone structure remains intact with a well-defined, pedunculated mass projecting from the metaphysis
cortical thickening is noted adjacent to a lesion with a central lucent zone
trabeculae within the lesion demonstrate an irregular pattern with increased spacing
endosteal scalloping is evident along the margins of the affected bone segment
multiple punctate calcifications are visible within a prominent osteochondromatous outgrowth
osteofibroma: bone structure remains intact without clear discontinuities
lesion presents as well-defined, round, radiolucent area within the metaphysis
cortical thickening surrounds a central radiopaque focus
trabeculae demonstrate an irregular pattern with increased spacing
endosteal scalloping is evident along the lateral cortex
osteosarcoma: bone structure exhibits extensive destruction with irregular, moth-eaten appearance
cortical disruption reveals multiple, jagged fractures throughout the affected area
lesion demonstrates marked radiolucency with ill-defined borders
trabeculae display an irregular pattern with significant spacing and blurring
surface shows pronounced endosteal scalloping and subperiosteal new bone formation
simple bone cyst: bone structure remains intact with uniform radiolucency within the diaphysis
cortical thinning is evident without evidence of fracture lines
lesion exhibits well-defined radiolucency with clear margins
trabeculae demonstrate increased spacing and irregularity
endosteal scalloping is noted along the bone cortex
synovial osteochondroma: bone structure remains intact with no clear discontinuities
lesions display prominent, well-defined radiolucent areas within the metaphysis
cortical thickening is evident surrounding the lesion area
trabeculae demonstrate a characteristic patchy loss with increased spacing
endosteal scalloping is observed along the medullary cavity border
